body_txt: A character replaces their hand with a hook or similar object. Bonus points if a crocodile is somehow involved. This is an example of Fashionable Asymmetry , Sub-Trope of Artificial Limbs , and is one of the stereotypical attributes of pirates . In most fiction, someone who uses one of these is probably evil , although exceptions are possible. More generally, it serves as a Red Right Hand , though such uses may have reached a Dead Horse Trope level. Such an individual will invariably be Dressed to Plunder . See also Hooks and Crooks . Seadog Peg Leg is a sister trope. Can overlap with Ironically Disabled Artist if a one-handed musician uses a hook to play an instrument.
